title: tragium peregrinum
intro: Tragium peregrinum, also known as Tragopogon peregrinus, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family and native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tragium peregrinum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, with some cultures also using it in cooking and as a food supplement.
